title: Why is market falling today? Sensex tanks 700 pts, Nifty below 23,900; 5 key triggers behind D-St selloff
description: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Tuesday, with the Sensex and Nifty seeing substantial losses and wiping out nearly Rs 4.57 lakh crore in investor wealth. This decline was largely influenced by weak global cues, particularly a sharp crash in South Korea's Kospi index and a selloff in technology stocks. Major Indian companies like Infosys and TCS also faced considerable drops, contributing to the market's downward trend.
summary_ko: Why is market falling today? Sensex tanks 700 pts, Nifty below 23,900; 5 key triggers behind D-St selloff — Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Tuesday, with the Sensex and Nifty seeing substantial losses and wiping out nearly Rs 4.57 lakh crore in investor wealth.

title: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: Sensex slips 220 pts, Nifty nears 24,000; South Korea's Kospi triggers circuit breaker
description: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: Sensex and Nifty traded in a narrow range on Tuesday morning as gains in pharma, banking and realty stocks were offset by weakness in IT and metal shares.Midcaps and smallcaps were mixed, while India VIX declined nearly 3 percent. Cipla, , Sun Pharma, Shriram Finance, ICICI Bank and Tata Consumer are among top gainers on the Nifty, while losers are Infosys, TCS, Hindalco, Wipro, Tech Mahindra.
